tradeIdeas.title: Long Brent Crude / Long ASEAN Energy Producers
tradeIdeas.rationale: Tehran Toll Booth active ($2M/vessel in yuan, Al Jazeera/Bloomberg confirmed); Brent $112.57/bbl confirmed (CNBC - highest since July 2022); WTI $99.64. Houthis entered war Mar 28 - Yemen fires first missile at Israel; multi-front war expanding; tail risk raised to 41%. Ground invasion feared (CNN Mar 29); Trump April 6 deadline unchanged. Toll booth entrenches Iranian Hormuz control; commercial P&I restoration structurally blocked. PTTEP and Medco remain cleanest ASEAN equity beta. Reduce conviction only on confirmed ceasefire with commercial Hormuz reopening.

tradeIdeas.title: Rebuild ASEAN Energy Long / Underweight ASEAN Banks
tradeIdeas.rationale: Tehran Toll Booth active (Al Jazeera, Bloomberg confirmed); Brent $112.57 confirmed (CNBC), iTraxx Asia IG est. ~178bp. ASEAN Energy Equities tracking Brent; ASEAN Banks under pressure on spread widening. Houthis entered war Mar 28 - multi-front expansion adds Brent upside risk; tail risk 41%. Energy-over-banks pair trades from stronger footing - toll booth entrenches elevated Brent. Trim banks underweight only if iTraxx breaks below 155bp on confirmed ceasefire with commercial Hormuz reopening.

tradeIdeas.title: PHP Short - Dip Opportunity on Trump-Driven Rally
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/PHP est. 60.50 (risk-off). Brent $112.57 confirmed (CNBC) and JKM ~$20.00/MMBtu (est.) - Philippines LNG import costs at structurally elevated levels. Tehran Toll Booth ($2M/vessel in yuan, Al Jazeera/Bloomberg confirmed) entrenches Hormuz control; no Ras Laffan restart path. Houthis entered war Mar 28 (Yemen-Israel missile) - Bab el-Mandeb risk adds secondary LNG supply disruption path. Stress target 61.50-62.50 still active; tail risk raised to 41%; next inflection is April 6 deadline. Stop only on confirmed ceasefire and Ras Laffan restart.

tradeIdeas.title: IDR Short - Re-Entry on Trump Pause Dip
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/IDR ~16,975 (confirmed Mar 27, exchange-rates.org). Brent $112.57 confirmed (CNBC) - $42.57/bbl above Indonesia's $70 ICP budget assumption; ID 10Y est. 6.95%, Bank Indonesia constrained. Tehran Toll Booth active ($2M/vessel in yuan); Houthis entered war Mar 28 adding multi-front instability; Trump April 6 deadline - Iran denies talks. Tail risk 41%; stress target 17,500-18,000; next inflection is April 6 deadline outcome. Stop only on ceasefire confirmed with Islamabad-hosted framework.

tradeIdeas.title: iTraxx Asia ex-Japan IG CDS Protection - Hold Through Apr 6
tradeIdeas.rationale: iTraxx Asia IG est. ~178bp (+6bp); ASEAN HY est. ~535bp (+13bp). Tehran Toll Booth active ($2M/vessel in yuan, Al Jazeera/Bloomberg confirmed) - P&I insurance restoration structurally impossible while Iranian sovereignty over Hormuz is tolled and legislated. Houthis entered war Mar 28 (Yemen-Israel missile, intercepted) - multi-front war expanding. Ground invasion feared (CNN Mar 29); Islamabad FM summit (Mar 29) is sole de-escalation signal. 185-200bp is the immediate next stress target - April 6 is the catalyst date. Hold CDS protection; do not reduce ahead of deadline.
instruments: Sapura Energy / Hyflux bond short via CDS

tradeIdeas.title: Long JKM LNG vs Short TTF - Hold Through Apr 6 Deadline
tradeIdeas.rationale: JKM ~$20.00/MMBtu (est.); TTF €54.52/MWh (oilpriceapi Mar 28 confirmed). Houthis entered war Mar 28 (Yemen-Israel missile) - Bab el-Mandeb secondary risk adds upside to JKM on any Red Sea disruption. Tehran Toll Booth ($2M/vessel in yuan) constrains Hormuz LNG flows; Qatar Ras Laffan restart structurally blocked. Brent $112.57 confirmed (CNBC) - energy supply constraint unresolved. JKM-TTF spread compression remains temporary; reinitiate on any toll booth suspension signal. Stop only on confirmed Ras Laffan restart.
instruments: Asia LNG spot cargo purchase via intermediary

cfTriggers.description: CRITICAL: Sapura Energy's refinancing window remains structurally closed. iTraxx Asia IG est. ~178bp; ASEAN HY est. ~535bp - unsecured market inaccessible. Tehran Toll Booth active ($2M/vessel in yuan); Houthis entered war Mar 28; tail scenario probability at 41%. Activate secured bank lines, private credit, and DFI-backed structures immediately - April 6 Trump deadline is the next binary event; execute before that date.

PTTEP should pre-fund before THB window closes - TH 10Y est. 2.08% (+3bp), USD/THB est. 33.55 (risk-off). Brent $112.57 confirmed (CNBC) boosts upstream EBITDA by $42.57/bbl vs $70 pre-shock; JKM ~$20.00/MMBtu (est.) keeps gas import costs elevated. Tehran Toll Booth active ($2M/vessel in yuan) - Gulf JV toll compliance review urgent. Houthis entered war Mar 28; tail risk 41%. Execute H2 2026 prefunding and Gulf JV sanctions/toll review before April 6 deadline.

Expand USD revolving-credit capacity immediately. Brent $112.57 confirmed (CNBC) and JKM ~$20.00 (est.) structurally elevated; USD/SGD est. 1.2880 (risk-off). Tehran Toll Booth ($2M/vessel in yuan, Al Jazeera/Bloomberg confirmed) entrenches Ras Laffan shutdown. Houthis entered war Mar 28; tail risk 41%. iTraxx Asia IG est. ~178bp - 185bp stress target is the April 6 event risk. Execute revolving credit expansion before that deadline; pricing deteriorates materially above 185bp.

Hyflux must activate restructuring immediately. Base 11%, stress 48%, tail 41%; Brent $112.57 confirmed (CNBC); ASEAN HY est. ~535bp. JKM ~$20.00 (est.) sustains gas-fired desalination cost spike. Tehran Toll Booth ($2M/vessel in yuan) entrenches Hormuz control; Houthis entered war Mar 28; tail scenario (oil $160+, LNG markets seized) now at 41%. April 6 is next binary event - unsecured market will not reopen before then. Pursue private-credit and quasi-sovereign structures with urgency.
